eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 07:26 PM ON FEB 24, 2026 Effective until 01:26 AM FEB 25, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Austin, Texas. Suspect vehicle is a red 2017 Ford Mustang with Texas license plate V V K 2 7 1 2. Missing child is Jazzlyn Anzora, 12 year old White female last seen wearing a red sweater, white long sleeve shirt, Christmas themed pants, and a Nike backpack. Suspect is Henry Mejia 18 year old White male. Call Travis County Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1. AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Austin, Texas. Suspect vehicle is a red 2017 Ford Mustang with Texas license plate V V K 2 7 1 2. Missing child is Jazzlyn Anzora, 12 year old White female last seen wearing a red sweater, white long sleeve shirt, Christmas themed pants, and a Nike backpack.
